specific_mechanism: DIRICHLET-SPEC: Dirichlet-series-coefficient analytic-continuation for spectral attention head pruning
llm_application: Form a Dirichlet series in s using attention-head importance values as coefficients; perform analytic continuation; prune heads whose continuation contribution is below epsilon at s=0 or s=1.
novelty_claim: Different from R676 Lévy-stable spectral attention. Uses Dirichlet-series-analytic-continuation as pruning signal.
